meaning: 韦克菲尔德[英国英格兰北部城市](西约克郡首府)
examples: The author and British medical doctor Andrew Wakefield claimed to have found a link between the measles-mumps-rubella (MMR) vaccine and an autismlike disorder.
Wakefield right now throws a lot slower, because he has that tricky knuckleball, he doesn't need to throw as fast.
The first day he put me on to translate "The Vicar of Wakefield."
Mr Taylor, from Wakefield, was arrested after a three-year investigation by Suffolk Trading Standards.
Mr Jackson points out that other dioceses, such as Wakefield, have seen the same happen.
